# Anchored Bash regular expressions for active former-name lines that are part
# of a documented compatibility contract. Keep these narrow; historical files
# are excluded separately and presentation copy belongs in FTW.
^docs/api\.md:detected `ftw` or legacy `forty-two-watts` service at the immutable target\.$
^docs/self-update\.md:.*`forty-two-watts:optimizer-…`.*$
^docs/self-update\.md:  forty-two-watts: # or ftw; detected from the persistent /app/data mount$
^docs/upgrade-from-legacy\.md:.*$
^README\.md:> \*\*Upgrading an existing Forty Two Watts installation\?\*\* Follow the$
^go/cmd/ftw-updater/main_test\.go:.*forty-two-watts.*$
^Makefile:.*-C \"\$\$stage\" ftw forty-two-watts ftw-pair.*$
^docs/ha-integration\.md:> \*\*Compatibility contract:\*\* the MQTT prefix `forty-two-watts`, discovery$
^docs/ha-integration\.md:> identifier `forty_two_watts`, client ID `forty-two-watts-ha`, and existing$
^docs/operations\.md:.*forty-two-watts.*compatibility symlink$
^docs/operations\.md:- The install alias lets existing `systemctl \.\.\. forty-two-watts` commands$
^go/cmd/ftw-updater/main\.go:.*legacyMainServiceName.*= \"forty-two-watts\"$
^go/cmd/ftw/main\.go:// caldavUsername resolves the CalDAV username \(default fortytwowatts\)\.$
^go/internal/ha/bridge\.go:.*topicPrefix string // stable wire ID, e\.g\. \"forty-two-watts\"$
^scripts/deploy-go\.sh:.*ln -sf ftw forty-two-watts$
^scripts/install-macos\.sh:.*MAIN_COUNT=.*forty-two-watts.*$
^scripts/install-macos\.sh:.*MAIN_SERVICE=.*forty-two-watts.*$
^scripts/migrate-legacy-compose\.sh:.*forty-two-watts.*$
